modal.title: Important Notice: AI Summary & HIPAA
bullets: Anthropic (Claude) and OpenAI (GPT) currently have NO HIPAA BAA with FHIRBridge hosted.
The hosted AI Summary feature is intended solely for individuals exporting their own data (self-directed consumer use).
If you are a HIPAA-covered entity or business associate, self-host FHIRBridge with your own BAA (Azure OpenAI / AWS Bedrock).
modal.checkbox_label: I confirm I have read and agree — I am not a HIPAA-covered entity processing commercial PHI.
